text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Huh, you're here already!? And in the front row! 
Wait, you've been at like every mock race haven't you? Crazy.
choice_data_list: I just really wanted to watch
I just really wanted to watch

text_block_list.text:
This was a necessary step to finding a partner Uma Musume. 
I was watching the race with a notepad in hand……and then, one day——

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And so it begins, a special showdown! With Uma Musume who have 
and haven't debuted yet, as well as a special guest from overseas!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Fuuu-. ……Alright!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text: ——And now it starts!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
They're off to a scattered start. After a slightly delayed start, 
Almond Eye is positioned about 10 lengths behind the lead——

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Almond Eye continues to monitor the front. ——Now, moving in 
to the final straight, the first to make their move is……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Right, heeeeeeeeerrre!!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Here comes Almond Eye! Almond Eye, it's Almond Eye! 
Can the three in front hold off her attack? Just a little longer——

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
None of them hold back! And surging out front is the runner 
from overseas! She pulls further, and further ahead and——Goal in!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Fourth……!!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but against that lineup…… Against girls who have 
already debuted, and that one from overseas, is already 
super tough. To still come in fourth is great isn't it?

Generally, it's rare for a pre-debut Uma Musume to be able to beat 
a post-debut one. Usually, they'd be happy just to place well——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
……I couldn't reach them at all……! 
Not in drive, or stamina, none of it!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Even though——there should have been more I could do……! 
～～～Aaah, geez……!
——The next week's mock race.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: Haa……haa! Thank you for the rematch!

text_block_list.name: Tiara-Seeking Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Likewise. But……I can hardly believe how much stronger 
you've become in such a short time. It was a splendid victory.

text_block_list.name: Tiara-Seeking Horsegirl
text_block_list.text:
Someday I'll get payback for this loss——in the Twinkle Series. 
Let's meet again.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I'll be looking forward to it! 
So that I don't lose to you, I'll keep polishing my strength!

I think that girl was second……Last week, she was one of 
the girls that defeated Almond Eye, if I remember correctly.
choice_data_list: (So she was able to get revenge)
(So she was able to get revenge)

text_block_list.text:
That she had such a desire for victory caught me by surprise. 
Then, in the following week——

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while, I'm Almond Eye. 
I look forward to working with you today!

The girl that Almond Eye was shaking hands with was a Senior 
class Tiara Uma Musume that she had lost to in that mock race.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I won't! Let you pass me! 
Just like this……!!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text: I will winーーー!!

That Tiara Uma Musume remained in second place as 
Almond Eye pulled further and further away—— 
She took an overwhelming victory over her opponent……!

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Haa! Haa! Haa! ……Fuu……! 
You're really strong. But——I won……! I was able to win!

……——It was hard to believe she was running in consecutive races. 
She brilliantly overcame her rivals, showing her incredible potential.
But rather than that, was she——

It wasn't completely outside the realm of 
possibility. Though, the last one was an overseas 
Uma Musume who was only here for that previous event.

In terms of their level, she would be extremely 
hard to beat, and she was probably back home now.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
Good afternoon! Sorry for being so sudden. We talked before at 
the riverbank, I'm Almond Eye. And, well……I have a favor to ask.

text_block_list.name: Almond Eye
text_block_list.text:
I want to go overseas to have a revenge match. And so…… 
Would you be able to accompany me as my chaperone while traveling……?
